name: CS Automotive
seoDescription: CS Automotive is an auto repair shop in Santa Rosa, CA, serving early- and late-model vehicles.

contact.address: W Barham Ave, Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Honest auto repair for Santa Rosa drivers
sections.subheading: CS Automotive works on early- and late-model vehicles. A clear, professional web presence would let local drivers find the shop, see what it does, and reach out with confidence.

sections.eyebrow: Why a site like this matters
sections.heading: A small shop's most-checked storefront is online
sections.body: Most drivers searching for a mechanic in Santa Rosa decide who to call before they ever pick up the phone. A focused, fast page — services, hours, location, and a way to reach you — turns a search into a booked job.
points: Show the services you actually offer
Make your hours and location obvious
Give first-time customers a reason to trust you
One tap to call or get directions

sections.heading: Is this your shop?
sections.body: This is a draft demo built for CS Automotive in Santa Rosa. The details below are placeholders until verified directly with the owner.

flags: UNVERIFIED: no confirmable hours, owner, founding year, services menu, or rating.

Conflicting phone numbers across listings (408-656-8798, 707-666-7240, 707-545-3461) — none confirmed.
Address (60/76 W Barham Ave) is shared with JSC Automotive, which Yelp lists as CLOSED — possible defunct/placeholder listing.
Held out of CRM per no-fabrication rule; needs owner contact to confirm the shop is operating and gather real facts before authoring a ready site.
